texto: I always thought when I hit 50 years old that'd be it for the travel. I don't have to tell you - you wait at an airport, your flight's delayed, get on a 14-hour flight, get off, get stuck in traffic, you get to the hotel and the room service is closed.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Brian Setzer sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “I always thought when I hit 50 years old that'd be it for the travel. I don't have to tell you - …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, service, thought, útil em momentos de viagem e thought.
